sql.where:
p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.PAGE_TYPE = 'REACT' AND p.APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED'
AND ( p.PAGE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR p.CREATE_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT h.INSTANCE_ID AS instanceId, s.INSTANCE_NAME AS instanceName, s.INSTANCE_IP AS instanceIp, s.INSTANCE_PORT AS instancePort, h.FILE_ID AS fileId, h.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, h.FILE_CRC_VALUE AS fileCrcValue, h.LAST_MODIFIER_ID AS lastModifierId, h.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME AS lastModifiedDtime FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS h JOIN FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE s ON h.INSTANCE_ID = s.INSTANCE_ID
ORDER BY h.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS h JOIN FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE s ON h.INSTANCE_ID = s.INSTANCE_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'REACT' AND APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT NVL(MAX( TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_REPLACE( REGEXP_SUBSTR(FILE_ID, '_v\d+\.(html|tsx)$'), '[^0-9]', '' )) ), 0) FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS WHERE FILE_ID LIKE #{pageId} || '_v%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS ( INSTANCE_ID, FILE_ID, FILE_SIZE, FILE_CRC_VALUE, LAST_MODIFIER_ID, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{fileId}, #{fileSize}, #{fileCrcValue}, #{lastModifierId}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select: SELECT PAGE_DESC FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'REACT' AND APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
